ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Bajaj Auto Limited announced that its critical business operations, including manufacturing, sales, and service activities, are functioning normally following a ransomware attack on June 23, 2026, which also impacted its wholly-owned subsidiary. While immediate operational disruptions appear mitigated, the ongoing investigation into this cybersecurity incident highlights an underlying vulnerability, with the full extent of the breach and potential long-term data security implications yet to be determined.
